title: <div>Yeah. In fact, the very 1st case I ever had when I did employment many year
content:
Yeah. In fact, the very 1st case I ever had when I did employment many years ago. It was a case involving race discrimination and retaliation. I, I don't know if I'm, I might have told this, but it involved a group of truck drivers who were working on the Miami River project, and they were, they, they're complaint of discrimination was that, that, and they got paid by the material they were hauling. And so they had this material they called cake. It was like a thicker, heavier product from the dredge project from the river

So, so this, this, this type of material paid more, and so when they went to the, when the black drivers took their trucks to get filled up, they were given the less desirable lighter material. And the Hispanics were given the heavier material.
